user_query: My sister and nephew are joining me on Day 6. He's 10 years old. What activities do I already have planned that would be fun for a kid?

selected_nodes.name: Ripley's Aquarium
selected_nodes.description: World-class aquarium with underwater tunnel and interactive exhibits. Indoor family attraction perfect for kids. Sharks, jellyfish, and touch tanks.
selected_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 6 > Ripley's Aquarium
selected_nodes.reasoning: Ripley's Aquarium is explicitly described as an indoor family attraction perfect for kids with interactive exhibits, touch tanks, and marine life — clearly a fun activity for a 10-year-old.

selected_nodes.name: Toronto Islands Ferry and Bike Ride
selected_nodes.description: Ferry ride to Toronto Islands followed by bike rental and exploration. Outdoor nature activity with beaches, gardens, and stunning skyline views. Perfect for families and kids.
selected_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 6 > Toronto Islands Ferry and Bike Ride
selected_nodes.reasoning: Toronto Islands Ferry and Bike Ride is labeled as perfect for families and kids, offering a ferry ride, bike riding, beaches and outdoor exploration — suitable and engaging for a child.

selected_nodes.name: Island Cafe Picnic Lunch
selected_nodes.description: Casual picnic-style lunch on Centre Island. Sandwiches and snacks from the island cafe. Relaxed outdoor dining.
selected_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 6 > Island Cafe Picnic Lunch
selected_nodes.reasoning: Island Cafe Picnic Lunch is a casual, outdoor picnic on Centre Island and noted as family friendly — a relaxed, kid-friendly activity option during the islands visit.
